standing: Born (evening) as the first NEW component of the heartbeat+callback+bus rework — the second substrate and sole path for inter-device communication, built before the ground_loop and shim because both fire onto the bus.

IMPLEMENTED to v0 and PROVEN green bare and under the tester — messages round-trip with why + causality in causal order, unknown/whyless refused, record channels refuse to collapse while diagnostic views digest, and transit is owner-gated through db_domain.
